title: Design tickflow lease metadata for tick schema
description: Design and implement the minimal tick data extension needed for Pi tickflow leases and resumability. Capture runner/session id, attempt number, worktree path if any, lease expiration, and enough ownership metadata to detect/recover stale in_progress work. Prefer backwards-compatible optional fields and update validation/tests.
acceptance_criteria: Tick JSON supports optional tickflow lease metadata or an equivalent documented .tick/logs lease file; stale/recovery semantics are documented; existing ticks remain backwards compatible; tests cover validation/backcompat if schema changes.
closed_reason: Added optional tickflow_lease metadata to tick schema with runner/session/attempt/worktree/owner/acquired/expires fields, validation, expiry helper, Release cleanup, and backcompat JSON tests.
